successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.validation.ts exists and exports createLeaveSchema that validates leaveTypeId as UUID, startDate and endDate as valid dates (YYYY-MM-DD) with startDate <= endDate, and optional reason.

constraints: Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing (this phase creates the validation schemas that will be used for that purpose).
outOfScope: Database access, repositories, or audit records
